name: toy-rot13
description: The flag is rot13-encoded inside this string. Decode it: synt{ebg13_jbexf_n_yvg}

name: toy-b64
description: Base64-decode this twice: WlhsS01HVklRWE5KYlVwd1ltMVNlbVJZVW1jOVBRPT0=. The result is the flag.

name: toy-strings
description: Run `strings` on the attached file and look for the flag.
